{"cards": [{"name": "Skyward Magistrate", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, you may return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If you do, you gain 2 life.", "flavor_text": ""Justice requires both wisdom and elevation above petty concerns."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius archetype signpost combining white's lifegain and blue's bounce effects. The optional trigger provides flexibility while the flying body supports tempo strategies. Power level appropriate for uncommon gold cards."}, {"name": "Torment Fiend", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Menace
When ~ enters, target opponent discards a card and ~ deals 2 damage to that player.
Whenever an opponent discards a card, ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": "Pain feeds its hunger, despair fuels its rage.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards discard synergies. Combines black's discard effects with red's aggressive damage. The power boost encourages building around discard effects while providing immediate value."}, {"name": "Pilgrim's Staff", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact — Equipment", "oracle_text": "Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink.
Equip {1}", "flavor_text": "A beacon of hope for those who walk the righteous path.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple equipment that provides a meaningful but not overwhelming bonus. Lifelink is appropriate for common complexity and provides utility across multiple archetypes."}, {"name": "Prismatic Conduit", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.
{5}, {T}: Draw a card.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Mana rock that scales from early fixing to late-game card advantage. Multiple activated abilities test complex artifact templating while providing meaningful choices at different game stages."}, {"name": "Seraph of Divine Judgment", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraph", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you gain 3 life and draw a card."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "3", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker embodying life manipulation themes. Plus ability provides incremental advantage, minus provides premium removal with white's life compensation, and ultimate creates a powerful engine. Starting loyalty balances immediate impact with protection needs."}]}
